## Description

<!-- Briefly describe your contribution. What does it add or change? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New tension (see `references/tension-atlas.md` extension guide)
- [ ] New invariant (see `references/invariant-atlas.md` extension guide)
- [ ] New case study (see `examples/`)
- [ ] New template (see `templates/`)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change
- [ ] Bug fix / correction

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate-atlas.py` exits with code 0
- [ ] No redundant atlas files exist in the repository root
- [ ] All new IDs follow the `{T|I}-{3-letters}-{3-digit-number}` format
- [ ] All cross-references are bidirectional (tension ↔ invariant)
- [ ] New entries include the `[EXPERIMENTAL]` marker unless CORE criteria are met
- [ ] Links to related issue(s): <!-- e.g., Closes #123 -->

## Notes for Reviewers

<!-- Any special considerations, design decisions, or areas needing attention? -->
